questionText: Break down your total gross global Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions by greenhouse gas type and provide the source of each used global warming potential (GWP).
questionKo: 귀사의 글로벌 총 Scope 1 배출량을 온실가스 유형별로 세분화하고, 사용한 각 지구온난화지수(GWP)의 출처를 제공하십시오.
sectorTags: Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: For many sectors and business activities, greenhouse gases other than carbon dioxide are significant and relevant. Since these gases are often only reported in CO2-equivalents (CO2e), their contribution to overall emissions is sometimes masked. CDP therefore requests companies to break down their gross Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions by GHG type.

columns.text: Scope 1 emissions (metric tons of selected gas)
Scope 2 location-based emissions (metric tons of selected gas)
columns.textKo: Scope 2 지역기반 emissions (metric tons of 선택 gas)

columns.text: Scope 2 location-based emissions (metric tons of CO2e)
columns.textKo: Scope 2 지역기반 emissions (metric tons of CO2e)

columns.text: Scope 2 market-based emissions (metric tons of selected gas)
columns.textKo: Scope 2 시장기반 emissions (metric tons of 선택 gas)

columns.text: Scope 2 market-based emissions (metric tons of CO2e)
columns.textKo: Scope 2 시장기반 emissions (metric tons of CO2e)

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes, both Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions", "Yes, Scope 1 emissions only" or "Yes, Scope 2 emissions only" in response to to column 1 "Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type" in 7.15.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "Yes, both Scope 1 및 Scope 2 배출량", "Yes, Scope 1 배출량 only" 또는 "Yes, Scope 2 배출량 only" in response to to 열 1 "Emissions breakdown by 온실가스 type" in 7.15.

guidance.text:
General 
Please report your organization's emissions of the Kyoto greenhouse gases, which are:
Carbon dioxide (CO2);
Methane (CH4);
Nitrous oxide (N2O);
Hydrofluorocarbon family of gases (HFCs);
Perfluorocarbon family of gases (PFCs);
Sulfur hexafluoride (SF6).
Nitrogen trifluoride (NF3).
The total value for emissions reported in column 3 "Scope 1 emissions (metric tons of CO2e)" should equal the value for gross global Scope 1 emissions reported in 7.6.
The total value for emissions reported in column 5 "Scope 2 location-based emissions (metric tons of CO2e)", should equal the value for gross global Scope 2, location-based emissions reported in 7.7. 
The total value for emissions reported in column 7 "Scope 2 market-based emissions (metric tons of CO2e)", should equal the value gross global Scope 2, market-based emissions reported in 7.7. 
Greenhouse gas (column 1) 
You can add rows for multiple greenhouse gas types and we request that you also add a row to report CO2.
Scope 1 and 2 (location and market-based) emissions (metric tons of selected gas) (columns 2, 4 and 6) 
Report your organization's emissions of the greenhouse gas selected in column 1 "Greenhouse gas" in metric tons (i.e., before applying global warming potential (GWP) values to convert to CO2-equivalents (CO2e)).
Scope 1 and 2 (location and market-based) emissions (metric tons of CO2e) (columns 3, 5 and 7) 
Apply global warming potential (GWP) values to convert your organization's emissions in metric tons of the greenhouse gas selected in column 1 "Greenhouse gas" into CO2-equivalents (CO2e).
If using Global Warming potentials from the IPCC Sixth Assessment Report (AR6 - 100 year or AR6 - 20 year) to calculate your Scope 1 emissions CO2e from CH4, you should first calculate the CO2e emissions from fossil CH4 and non-fossil CH4 separately using the relevant GWP, then sum these figures to provide in column 2 the total Scope 1 CO2e emissions from both fossil and non-fossil CH4.
GWP Reference (column 8) 
Identify the GWP your organization has used to convert the selected greenhouse gas into a carbon dioxide equivalent (CO2e). If you have used a calculation tool and do not know which GWPs have been applied to your data, consult the tool documentation or reference sources.
If you select "Other, please specify", provide a label for the GWP Reference.
guidance.textKo: 일반 Please report 귀사의 emissions 의 Kyoto 온실가스es, which are: Carbon dioxide (CO2); Methane (CH4); Nitrous oxide (N2O); Hydrofluorocarbon family of gases (HFCs); Perfluorocarbon family of gases (PFCs); Sulfur hexafluoride (SF6). Nitrogen trifluoride (NF3). The total value for emissions 보고 in 열 3 "Scope 1 배출량 (metric tons of CO2e)" 해야 합니다 equal the value for 전 세계 총 Scope 1 배출량 보고 in 7.6. The total value for emissions 보고 in 열 5 "Scope 2 지역기반 emissions (metric tons of CO2e)", 해야 합니다 equal the value for 전 세계 총 Scope 2, 지역기반 emissions 보고 in 7.7. The total value for emissions 보고 in 열 7 "Scope 2 시장기반 emissions (metric tons of CO2e)", 해야 합니다 equal the value 전 세계 총 Scope 2, 시장기반 emissions 보고 in 7.7. 온실가스 (열 1) You can add 행 for multiple 온실가스 types 및 we request that you also add a 행 to report CO2. Scope 1 및 2 (location 및 시장기반) emissions (metric tons of 선택 gas) (열 2, 4 및 6) Report 귀사의 emissions 의 온실가스 선택 in 열 1 "온실가스" in metric tons (i.e., before applying global warming potential (GWP) values to convert to CO2-equivalents (CO2e)). Scope 1 및 2 (location 및 시장기반) emissions (metric tons of CO2e) (열 3, 5 및 7) Apply global warming potential (GWP) values to convert 귀사의 emissions in metric tons 의 온실가스 선택 in 열 1 "온실가스" into CO2-equivalents (CO2e). 만약 using Global Warming potentials from the IPCC Sixth Assessment Report (AR6 - 100 year 또는 AR6 - 20 year) to calculate your Scope 1 배출량 CO2e from CH4, you 해야 합니다 first calculate the CO2e emissions from fossil CH4 및 non-fossil CH4 separately using the 관련 GWP, then sum these figures to provide in 열 2 the total Scope 1 CO2e emissions from both fossil 및 non-fossil CH4. GWP Reference (열 8) Identify the GWP 귀사 has used to convert the 선택 온실가스 into a carbon dioxide equivalent (CO2e). 만약 you have used a 계산 tool 및 do not know which GWPs have been applied to your data, consult the tool documentation 또는 reference sources. 만약 you select "Other, 직접 입력", provide a label 에 대한 GWP Reference.

guidance.text: Changes in Global Warming Potentials (GWPs): Estimates of GWPs have changed over time as scientific understanding has developed. GWP factors are reassessed every few years in the IPCC Assessment Reports and accordingly, CDP recommends that companies use the latest GWPs given in the IPCC's Sixth Assessment Report (AR6) . This approach is aligned with the GHG Protocol Required Greenhouse Gases in Inventories: Accounting and Reporting Standard Amendment which states that the company "shall use 100-year GWP values from the IPCC and should use GWP values from the most recent Assessment Report, but may choose to use other IPCC Assessment Reports."
guidance.textKo: Changes in Global Warming Potentials (GWPs): Estimates of GWPs have changed over time as scientific understanding has developed. GWP factors are reassessed every few years in the IPCC Assessment Reports 및 accordingly, CDP recommends that companies use the latest GWPs given in the IPCC's Sixth Assessment Report (AR6). This approach is aligned with the GHG Protocol Required 온실가스es in Inventories: Accounting 및 Reporting Standard Amendment which states that the company "shall use 100-year GWP values from the IPCC 및 해야 합니다 use GWP values from the most recent Assessment Report, but may choose to use other IPCC Assessment Reports."

guidance.text: Global warming potential (GWP): The Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC)'s Sixth Assessment Report (AR6) defines the Global Warming Potential (GWP) as "an index measuring the radiative forcing following an emission of a unit mass of a given substance, accumulated over a chosen time horizon, relative to that of the reference substance, carbon dioxide (CO 2 ). The GWP thus represents the combined effect of the differing times these substances remain in the atmosphere and their effectiveness in causing radiative forcing." By using GWPs, GHG emissions from multiple gases can be standardized to a carbon dioxide equivalent (CO 2 e).
guidance.textKo: Global warming potential (GWP): The Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC)'s Sixth Assessment Report (AR6) defines the Global Warming Potential (GWP) as "an index measuring the radiative forcing following an emission of a unit mass of a given substance, accumulated over a chosen time horizon, relative to that 의 reference substance, carbon dioxide (CO 2). The GWP thus represents the combined effect 의 differing times these substances remain in the atmosphere 및 their effectiveness in causing radiative forcing." By using GWPs, 온실가스 배출량 from multiple gases can be standardized to a carbon dioxide equivalent (CO 2 e).

criteria.criteria:
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Greenhouse gas' in at least one row to be eligible for points.
For rows where any option excluding 'Other, please specify' is selected: Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 하나 이상 option 제외 'Other, 직접 입력' 선택 in 열 '온실가스' in 최소 one 행 to be 획득 가능 for 점. For 행 여기서 하나 이상 option 제외 'Other, 직접 입력' is 선택: 점수가 부여됩니다 per 완성 행 in proportion to the number of 행 공개. 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 4/4점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
ROUTE A)
Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 1 emissions…' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Gross global Scope 1 emissions…' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.6 (± 5%) - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 1 emissions…' is not equal to the figure provided in column 'Gross global Scope 1 emissions…' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.6 (± 5%) - 0/3 points
A maximum of 0/3 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 인지 점수를 획득하려면 공시에서 최고점을 획득해야 합니다. 경로 A) Sum of figures 입력 in 열 'Scope 1 배출량…' is equal to the figure 입력 in 열 '전 세계 총 Scope 1 배출량…' in 행 '보고연도' in 문항 7.6 (± 5%) - 1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 B) Sum of figures 입력 in 열 'Scope 1 배출량…' is not equal to the figure 입력 in 열 '전 세계 총 Scope 1 배출량…' in 행 '보고연도' in 문항 7.6 (± 5%) - 0/3 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/3점입니다.

criteria.criteriaKo: 하나 이상 option 제외 'Other, 직접 입력' 선택 in 열 '온실가스' in 최소 one 행 to be 획득 가능 for 점. For 행 여기서 하나 이상 option 제외 'Other, 직접 입력' is 선택: 점수가 부여됩니다 per 완성 행 in proportion to the number of 행 공개. 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 4/4점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
ROUTE A)
Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 1 emissions…' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Gross global Scope 1 emissions…' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.6 (± 5%) - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 1 emissions…' is not equal to the figure provided in column 'Gross global Scope 1 emissions…' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.6 (± 5%) - 0/3 points
A maximum of 0/3 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 인지 점수를 획득하려면 공시에서 최고점을 획득해야 합니다. 경로 A) Sum of figures 입력 in 열 'Scope 1 배출량…' is equal to the figure 입력 in 열 '전 세계 총 Scope 1 배출량…' in 행 '보고연도' in 문항 7.6 (± 5%) - 1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 B) Sum of figures 입력 in 열 'Scope 1 배출량…' is not equal to the figure 입력 in 열 '전 세계 총 Scope 1 배출량…' in 행 '보고연도' in 문항 7.6 (± 5%) - 0/3 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/3점입니다.

change.question_ko: 귀사의 글로벌 총 Scope 1 배출량을 온실가스 유형별로 세분화하고, 사용한 각 지구온난화지수(GWP)의 출처를 제공하십시오.
change.q2025_text: Break down your total gross global Scope 1 emissions by greenhouse gas type and provide the source of each used global warming potential (GWP).
change.change_summary:
Question appears for organizations that select "Yes, both Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions" or "Yes, Scope 1 emissions only" in response to column 1 "Emissions breakdown by greenhouse gas type" of 7.15.
New column
change.daml_summary: General: D 4/4 | A 0 or 1/1 or 3 | M 0/0 | L 0/0

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

sectorTagsKo: 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, Food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: For many sectors 및 business activities, greenhouse gases other than carbon dioxide are significant 및 관련. Since these gases are often only 보고 in CO2-equivalents (CO2e), their contribution to overall emissions is sometimes masked. CDP therefore requests companies to break down their gross Scope 1 및 Scope 2 배출량 by GHG type.
